questions.question: Reality TV became globally popular in the late 90s with this show where people competed to be the last on the island.
On sweatpants in the 90s, where were messages printed?
"Like the legend of the phoenix/All ends with beginnings/What keeps the planet spinning/The force of love beginning." Name that song.
What Constitutional Amendment has been hotly debated for most of the Millennials' adult lives?
questions.answer: The 2nd Amendment or Right to Bear Arms
